title: Before the Queen Elizabeth II Cup

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
At 2,200 meters long, the Queen Elizabeth II Cup
is a medium-distance race just like the Japanese
Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Running the Oaks was really rough on me. Just
remembering it is scary...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer believes I can do this, so I have to do
my best!
